instructions: How can you train your dog? Use what you have learned to write some sentences to explain it to me. Step 1: ..., Step 2: ..., and so on.
advice: Look at each picture. Piture 1 is step 1. Picture 2 is step 2, and so on. The words can also help you.
title: How to train your dog

words.japanese: あなたに集中している
